title: stitch-mcp Server Configuration
description: Configuration for the stitch-mcp server, which provides UI/UX design tools. stitch-mcp allows the assistant to extract design tokens, retrieve generated frontend code, capture design screenshots, generate new screens from natural language prompts, and manage design projects.

tools.name: extract_design
tools.description: Extract design tokens (colours, typography, spacing, shadows) from a design file or running screen.

source.description: Path to a design file (Figma export, SVG, PNG) or a project/screen identifier to extract tokens from.

token_types.description: Which categories of design tokens to extract. Defaults to all token types.

format.description: Output format for the extracted design tokens.

tools.name: get_code
tools.description: Retrieve generated frontend component code for a design screen or component.

screen_id.description: The identifier of the screen or component to retrieve generated code for.

framework.description: The target frontend framework for the generated code.

include_styles.description: Whether to include CSS/styling code alongside the component markup.

tools.name: get_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a rendered screenshot of a design screen or component at a specified viewport size.

screen_id.description: The identifier of the screen or component to screenshot.

viewport.description: The viewport size at which to render and capture the screenshot.

output_path.description: Optional absolute path to save the screenshot image.

tools.name: generate_screen
tools.description: Generate a new UI screen or component design from a natural language prompt.

prompt.description: A natural language description of the UI screen or component to generate (e.g. 'a dark-themed login page with email and password fields and a gradient button').

style_guide.description: Optional reference to an existing design token file or project style guide to apply consistent branding.

output_name.description: Optional name for the generated screen (used as its identifier for subsequent operations).

tools.name: manage_project
tools.description: Create, list, update, or delete design projects within the stitch workspace.

action.description: The project management action to perform.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project to act on. Required for 'get', 'update', and 'delete' actions.

name.description: The name for the project. Required when action is 'create'; optional for 'update'.

description.description: Optional description of the project's purpose.
